name: Web Search Engine
description: Guarded web search, scrape, and crawl tools. No API key required — uses DuckDuckGo HTML scraping for search.

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web using DuckDuckGo (no API key required). Returns ranked results with titles, URLs, and descriptions.

count.description: Number of results to return. Default 10, max 20.

tools.name: web_scrape
tools.description: Fetch an explicit public URL and extract structured content: readable text, links, or both.

url.description: The explicit public URL to fetch.

extract.description: What to extract: 'text', 'links', or 'all'. Defaults to 'text'.

tools.name: web_crawl
tools.description: Bounded domain crawl from a seed URL. Follows links up to `depth` levels deep, stays within the same domain, returns page summaries. Max depth 3, max pages 20.

url.description: The seed URL to start crawling from.

depth.description: How many link-hops deep to follow. Max 3. Defaults to 1.

max_pages.description: Hard cap on total pages fetched. Max 20. Defaults to 10.

delay.description: Seconds to wait between requests to avoid rate-limiting. Defaults to 0.5.
